strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across software, hardware, and infrastructure
Demonstrated AI-agent infrastructure work and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Proven entrepreneurial initiative with open-source GISCollective platform used by real organizations
concerns: No evidence of Master's or PhD in AI-related field despite preference
Lack of explicit cloud platform leadership (e.g., AWS/GCP/Azure AI product strategy)
No cited AI-powered product or platform built with ML/AI models, only tooling and infrastructure
response.justification: The candidate has 15+ years of engineering experience and concrete involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, satisfying the core requirement of AI-focused engineering leadership. However, there is no evidence of building or leading AI-powered products or platforms using ML models, nor any cloud AI strategy experience — critical for a director-level AI strategy role. While entrepreneurial and full-stack skills are strong, the absence of advanced AI education and demonstrable AI product ownership significantly limits alignment with preferred qualifications.
